# Auto-generated prettier chain signature. Do not edit manually.
# Regenerate: deno task fixtures:update:formatted <pattern>
#
# Each %%PASS=N%% section is exactly prettier^N(output_prettier.<ext>).
# This file exists when prettier is non-idempotent on output_prettier.* — it pins
# the full chain so the audit recognizes the case and the validator catches drift.
# See docs/fixture_overview.md (rule F4) and crates/tsv_debug/src/fixtures/audit_signature.rs.

%%PASS=2 (fixed point)%%
<script lang="ts">
	// An own-line multiline block comment in an indexed access's `[`→index gap hangs
	// the index on its own line, the comment kept inside the brackets where the author
	// wrote it — inlining it would reflow the author's break. A GLUED multiline block
	// collapses inline instead (keyword_value_glued_multiline_block_comment), as does a
	// single-line block in any position (indexed_access_own_line_block_comment).
	type X = A;
	/* c
		d */ [K];
</script>
